description: Create a fully-constrained 2D profile of an omega pipe strap centered at the origin (0,0). The design requires an inner arc with a 20mm radius and a concentric outer arc with a 25mm radius, both with endpoints on the horizontal axis. Attach symmetric mounting flanges to each side, where each flange consists of a 20mm horizontal bottom edge, a 5mm vertical outer edge, and a 20mm horizontal top edge. Extrude the resulting closed profile to a width of 30mm and save the model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/pipe_strap.slvs.
